headline: CME Group (CME) Valuation Check After Record Volumes And New Digital Settlement Partnerships
summary: CME Group (CME) is back in focus after reporting record trading volumes across every major product category, while also working with BMO and Google Cloud on 24/7 tokenized cash settlement and expanding data access through Stocktwits. See our latest analysis for CME Group. The recent news around record trading volumes and new partnerships comes as CME Group’s 1-day share price return of 2.75% and 7-day share price return of 2.53% contrast with a 30-day share price return of negative 6.16%...

headline: CME Group Tests 24 7 Crypto Trading And Tokenized Cash Settlement Potential
summary: CME Group (NasdaqGS:CME) plans to extend cryptocurrency futures and options trading to a 24/7 schedule. The company is also working with BMO and Google Cloud on 24/7 tokenized cash settlement for institutional clients. These developments expand CME Group's role in regulated digital asset markets and real time settlement infrastructure. CME Group, known for its futures and options markets across asset classes, is pushing further into digital assets with round the clock access to regulated...
